things.name: Nottingham Castle
things.description: Historic castle and museum on a sandstone rock with views over the city

things.name: Sherwood Forest
things.description: Ancient royal forest famous as the home of Robin Hood with 1,000-year-old Major Oak

things.name: City of Caves
things.description: Network of 500+ sandstone caves beneath the city streets with fascinating history

things.name: Wollaton Hall
things.description: Spectacular Elizabethan mansion in a deer park, used as Wayne Manor in The Dark Knight Rises

things.name: Old Market Square
things.description: One of the largest market squares in England, lined with cafes and hosting events year-round

things.name: Nottingham Contemporary
things.description: Largest contemporary art gallery in the East Midlands with changing exhibitions

things.name: Green's Windmill
things.description: Restored 19th-century tower mill where mathematician George Green was born and worked

things.name: National Ice Centre
things.description: Home to the Nottingham Panthers and Britain's largest twin-pad indoor ice facility

things.name: Nottingham Arboretum
things.description: Victorian park and one of the oldest public parks in England

things.name: Tales of Robin Hood
things.description: Interactive attraction bringing the Robin Hood legend vividly to life
